description_long: This is a countertop electric mixer featuring a robust, two-tone chassis with a matte white upper section and a dark gray lower body. The mixer is equipped with a large, detachable mixing bowl made of dark, likely metallic or plastic material, which sits securely in a recessed base. The top section houses a transparent splash guard or lid, and a prominent control knob is visible on the side, suggesting variable speed settings. The overall design is modern and functional, with smooth, rounded edges and a compact footprint suitable for kitchen environments. The rear of the mixer is streamlined, with minimal detailing, while the front and sides provide access to the bowl and controls. No visible brand logo is present, and the mixer appears to be designed for domestic or light commercial use.
description: A modern, two-tone electric countertop mixer with a large detachable bowl, transparent lid, and side control knob. The design is compact, rounded, and functional for kitchen use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bowl, transparent lid, and handles on either side of the bowl.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the control knob, bowl, and the mixer head with its lid.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, enclosed back of the mixer with minimal features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open space under the mixer head and the bowl's profile.
attribute_control_panel_type: single analog dial with possible push-button function, located on the side
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a modern, compact, and rounded form
